title.en: PMDA Website Adds 'Jump to Body' Skip Navigation Link for Accessibility
title.zh: PMDA网站新增“跳至正文”跳过导航链接以改善无障碍访问

summary.en: The Pharmaceuticals and Medical Devices Agency (PMDA) website has implemented a 'Jump to body' skip navigation link at its pages, likely as part of web accessibility enhancements. This feature allows users using screen readers or keyboard navigation to bypass repetitive navigation menus and go directly to the main content. Medical device manufacturers and regulatory professionals accessing PMDA guidelines or public information online may notice this user interface change; no action is required as it does not affect the substance or availability of regulatory documents.
summary.zh: 日本医药品医疗器械综合机构（PMDA）在其网站上添加了“跳至正文”的跳过导航链接，这很可能是为了提升网站的无障碍访问性。该功能使使用屏幕阅读器或键盘导航的用户能够跳过重复的导航菜单，直接进入主要内容。访问PMDA指南或公开信息的医疗器械制造商和法规专业人员可能会注意到这一界面变化，但该变更不影响法规文件的内容或获取方式，因此无需采取任何行动。

title.en: PMDA Japanese Website Updated: 10 New Regulatory Items Detected
title.zh: PMDA日文官网更新：检测到10项新法规内容

summary.en: The Pharmaceuticals and Medical Devices Agency (PMDA) has refreshed its Japanese-language homepage with 10 new updates. Regulatory affairs professionals monitoring Japan's medical device and pharmaceutical regulations should review the latest postings for potential compliance impacts. The additions may include safety alerts, guidance revisions, or procedural changes.
summary.zh: 日本药品与医疗器械管理局（PMDA）更新了其日文官网，共新增10项内容。关注日本医疗器械和药品法规的监管事务专业人员应查看最新发布，以评估对合规的潜在影响。新增内容可能包含安全警示、指南修订或程序变更。

title.en: PMDA Updates English Contact Page for Inquiries
title.zh: PMDA更新英文咨询联系页面

summary.en: The Pharmaceuticals and Medical Devices Agency (PMDA) has updated its English-language 'Contact us' page, providing revised points of contact and inquiry methods. This page is relevant for overseas medical device manufacturers and regulatory professionals seeking assistance or information from PMDA. Users should review the updated contact details to ensure proper communication channels are used.
summary.zh: 日本药品与医疗器械管理局（PMDA）更新了其英文版“联系我们”页面，提供了修订后的联系点和咨询方式。此页面适用于寻求PMDA协助或信息的海外医疗器械制造商和法规事务专业人员。用户应查看更新后的联系信息，以确保使用正确的沟通渠道。

title.en: PMDA Launches 'Reviews and Related Services' Information Page
title.zh: PMDA发布“审查与相关服务”信息页面

summary.en: The PMDA has released a new webpage titled 'Reviews and Related Services,' which consolidates information on the review process for medical devices, pharmaceuticals, and regenerative medical products. The page outlines the types of reviews, consultation services, and relevant procedures available to manufacturers and importers. Regulatory affairs professionals should review this resource to better understand product approval pathways and post-market review obligations.
summary.zh: PMDA发布了名为“审查与相关服务”的新网页，汇总了医疗器械、药品和再生医疗产品的审查流程信息。该页面介绍了审查类型、咨询服务以及面向制造商和进口商的相关程序。法规事务专业人员应查阅此资源，以更清晰地了解产品批准路径和上市后审查义务。

title.en: PMDA Consultation Services for Medical Device Clinical Trials and Regulatory Strategy
title.zh: PMDA就医疗器械临床试验与监管策略提供咨询

summary.en: This PMDA page outlines the agency's consultation services for medical device developers, including clinical trial consultations and regulatory review meetings. Companies seeking market approval in Japan can use these sessions to align with PMDA expectations on clinical data requirements and application content. Applicants must select the appropriate consultation type and prepare detailed briefing documents in advance. The service covers pre-submission, clinical trial planning, and post-approval stages.
summary.zh: 该页面介绍PMDA为医疗器械开发者提供的咨询服务，涵盖临床试验咨询和监管审查会议。寻求日本市场准入的企业可通过这些咨询与PMDA就临床数据要求和申报内容达成一致。申请人需选择合适的咨询类别并提前准备详细的说明资料。服务覆盖申报前、临床试验规划及获批后等各阶段。

title.en: PMDA Introduces Consultation Services for New Modalities and New Approach Methodologies (NAMs)
title.zh: PMDA推出针对新模态与新方法学（NAMs）的咨询服务

summary.en: The PMDA has launched a dedicated consultation platform for developers of innovative products categorized as 'new modalities' (including cell and gene therapies, nucleic acid medicines) and those employing New Approach Methodologies (NAMs) to reduce reliance on animal testing. The service provides scientific advice to facilitate regulatory approvals and accelerate development of advanced therapies and alternative safety assessment methods. Affected stakeholders, particularly sponsors of advanced therapeutic products, are advised to engage early with this service to clarify regulatory expectations.
summary.zh: PMDA推出了面向'新模态'（如细胞与基因治疗、核酸药物等）及采用新方法学（NAMs，替代动物试验）开发者的专项咨询平台。该服务提供科学建议，协助加速先进疗法与新型安全性评价方法的监管审批。建议相关方（尤其是先进治疗产品的申办者）尽早利用此项服务，明确监管要求。

title.en: PMDA GLP, GCP, and GPSP Compliance Assessments Overview
title.zh: PMDA 对 GLP、GCP 和 GPSP 合规评估的概述

summary.en: This item details the PMDA's framework for assessing compliance with Good Laboratory Practice (GLP), Good Clinical Practice (GCP), and Good Post-marketing Study Practice (GPSP). It applies to sponsors and investigators conducting non-clinical studies, clinical trials, and post-marketing surveillance in Japan. The page outlines the assessment process, relevant standards, and expectations for regulatory submissions. Stakeholders should review the guidance to ensure their studies meet Japanese regulatory requirements.
summary.zh: 本条目详细介绍了 PMDA 对药物非临床研究质量管理规范（GLP）、药物临床试验质量管理规范（GCP）和上市后研究质量管理规范（GPSP）合规性的评估框架。适用于在日本进行非临床研究、临床试验和上市后监测的申办方及研究者。页面概述了评估流程、相关标准及提交要求。相关方应审查本指南，确保研究符合日本监管要求。

title.en: PMDA Informational Page on GMP, QMS, and GCTP Inspections
title.zh: PMDA发布GMP、QMS、GCTP检查相关信息页面

summary.en: This PMDA page outlines the scope and process for Good Manufacturing Practice (GMP), Quality Management System (QMS), and Good Clinical and Tissue Practice (GCTP) inspections in Japan. It is relevant to manufacturers and marketing authorization holders of pharmaceuticals, medical devices, and regenerative medical products seeking market access. The page explains inspection categories, application requirements, and categories that may be exempt, helping foreign companies understand compliance expectations during the review process.
summary.zh: 该PMDA页面介绍了日本对药品、医疗器械及再生医疗产品实施GMP、QMS和GCTP符合性检查的范围与流程。相关制造商和上市许可持有人可了解检查类别、申请要求及豁免情形，为进入日本市场做好准备。页面为海外企业提供了审查阶段合规要求的明确指引。

title.en: PMDA Assessments for Registered Certification Bodies (QMS/GMP/GCTP)
title.zh: PMDA对注册认证机构（QMS/GMP/GCTP）的评估

summary.en: The PMDA conducts routine assessments of registered certification bodies (RCBs) that perform conformity inspections for medical devices and IVDs under Japan's Pharmaceutical and Medical Device Act. These evaluations verify that RCBs maintain proper competence, impartiality, and adherence to QMS, GMP, and GCTP requirements. Manufacturers using RCB certifications should monitor these oversight activities, as they can affect certificate validity and recognition.
summary.zh: PMDA定期对执行医疗器械和体外诊断试剂符合性检查的注册认证机构进行评估。这些评估验证认证机构在QMS、GMP和GCTP方面是否保持适当的能力、公正性和合规性。依赖注册认证机构认证的制造商应关注此项监督，因其可能影响证书的有效性和认可度。

title.en: PMDA Early Consideration (Soudan) Consultation Service for Medical Devices – Regulatory Information
title.zh: 日本PMDA“早期考虑”医疗器械法规咨询服务页面

summary.en: This PMDA webpage details the Early Consideration (Soudan) consultation service, which allows medical device manufacturers to seek regulatory advice during early development stages. The service helps clarify Japanese regulatory requirements, clinical trial design, and submission strategies before formal review. Manufacturers can apply for different consultation categories and receive guidance from PMDA experts, facilitating smoother market entry into Japan.
summary.zh: 该PMDA网页介绍了“早期考虑”（Soudan）咨询服务，帮助医疗器械制造商在早期开发阶段就日本的法规要求、临床试验设计和注册策略获得官方指导。制造商可申请不同类别的咨询并获得PMDA专家意见，旨在加速产品在日本的市场准入。
